    D

    DAILY - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.Frequency
    Task must be performed every day.
    DataInitializer - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.config
    Initializes the database with test data on application startup.
    DataInitializer() - Constructor for class ntnu.no.fs_v26.config.DataInitializer
     
    delete(Long, User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.ChecklistController
    Deletes a checklist by ID.
    deleteChecklist(Long, User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.ChecklistService
    Deletes a checklist by ID.
    deleteUser(Long) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AdminController
    Deletes a user by ID.
    deleteUser(Long) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.AdminService
    Deletes a user by ID.
    Deviation - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.model
    Entity representing a deviation within the system.
    Deviation() - Constructor for class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.Deviation
     
    DeviationController - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller
    REST controller for deviation reporting and management.
    DeviationController() - Constructor for class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.DeviationController
     
    DeviationModule - Enum Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.model
    Enumeration representing the module or domain area where a deviation occurred.
    DeviationRepository - Interface in ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository
    Repository for Deviation entities.
    DeviationRequest - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller
    Request body used when reporting a new deviation.
    DeviationRequest() - Constructor for class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.DeviationRequest
     
    DeviationService - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.service
    Service class for deviation report management.
    DeviationService() - Constructor for class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.DeviationService
     
    DeviationStatus - Enum Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.model
    Enumeration representing the lifecycle status of a deviation.
    DocumentAcknowledgement - Class in ntnu.no.fs_v26.model
    Entity representing a user's acknowledgement of a training document.
    DocumentAcknowledgement() - Constructor for class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.DocumentAcknowledgement
     
    DocumentAcknowledgementRepository - Interface in ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository
    Repository for DocumentAcknowledgement entities.
    doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, FilterChain) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter
    Performs the internal filtering logic for JWT authentication.
    downloadFile(Long) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Downloads the file associated with a training document.
